patch_type: Model-driven Proof Pack over V56.4 Core Trust Scoring Models
release_chain_status: V57 is the current implemented build. It loads after V56.4 in src/ui/v52-7-operational-layer.js. It adds a model-driven Proof Pack that ties together the score contract, Core Trust Scoring Models, decision records, evidence register, assumptions, caveats, owner, risk if wrong, next step, and prototype boundary while preserving no-new-top-level-tabs rule. GitHub Pages browser QA is required after deploy.
top_level_tab_rule: Do not add more top-level tabs. Upgrade existing workspaces only.
version_label_rule: Build and version labels belong in Settings/admin metadata and repo documentation only. They must not appear as executive-facing dashboard content.
public_naming_rule: Public product name is CyberShield Executive OS. Current prototype build is V57. Do not call the public build CyberShield OS v8 unless the repo, README, loader, Settings/admin metadata, and public UX intentionally move to that version scheme.
controlling_doctrine: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
v57_changes: adds a model-driven Proof Pack surface into Proof Pack
adds a proof artifact surface into Runtime
adds text download for the Proof Pack
pulls from loaded decision records, evidence register, score contract, and Core Trust Scoring Models where available
preserves V56.4 Core Trust Scoring Models
preserves V56.3 Universal Score Object and Score Band Contract
preserves V56.1 Evidence and Assumption Register

model_driven_proof_pack.boundary: Static advisory prototype only. No live evidence retrieval, live scoring, live claim extraction, certification, legal determination, report delivery, ticketing, or workflow automation.

core_trust_scoring_models.boundary: Prototype model definitions only. No live scoring, live claim extraction, live evidence retrieval, certification, legal determination, or production-calibrated scoring.

universal_score_contract.boundary: Static advisory prototype contract only. No live scoring, enforcement, evidence retrieval, certification, or production-calibrated scoring.

decision_record_hardening.boundary: Static advisory records only. No live approvals, ticketing, enforcement, evidence retrieval, banking verification, or compliance validation.

trust_model_registry.boundary: Demo-directional advisory models only. No certification, live evidence retrieval, legal determination, or production-calibrated scoring.

trustmap_interaction_layer.boundary: Static advisory navigation only. Does not create tickets, retrieve evidence, send notifications, or trigger live workflows.

internet_trust_engine_future_track.sequence_note: V57 prepares the Proof Pack for future Internet Trust Engine and artifact/claim reliance work, but does not implement live artifact analysis, live scoring, claim extraction, evidence retrieval, or internet verification.

recommended_next_build.label: V57.1 Board and Executive Narrative Layer
goals: convert Proof Pack outputs into board-ready language

prototype_boundary: The current GitHub Pages build is a lightweight static advisory prototype. It is not connected to live enterprise telemetry, SIEM, EDR, IAM, Microsoft 365, cloud control planes, GRC tooling, production agent enforcement, Google Sheets, CRM sync, ticketing, notifications, marketplace systems, ad platforms, domain-intelligence systems, identity verification systems, CMMC certification systems, healthcare compliance validation systems, banking/payment systems, live evidence retrieval, live scoring, live claim extraction, internet claim verification, report delivery, ticketing, or takedown automation.
known_limitations: Proof Pack uses static prototype and loaded in-browser registry data
Proof Pack download is a text file, not a branded PDF
Proof Pack does not retrieve live evidence
Proof Pack does not certify compliance or validate legal conclusions
Proof Pack does not send reports, create tickets, or trigger workflows
Core Trust Scoring Models are prototype model definitions, not production-calibrated scoring engines
V57 does not perform live scoring
V57 does not perform live claim extraction
Internet Trust Engine is documented as a future requirement track but is not yet implemented
GitHub Pages browser QA required after deploy
